jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
